description:
The release workflow (`.github/workflows/release.yml`) currently re-runs the full test suite (build, type-check, lint, format, audit) before calling semantic-release. This is redundant — CI already gates every merge to main with these same checks. Re-running adds ~5-10 minutes of unnecessary overhead to every release and wastes CI minutes.

The helix repo's publish workflow skips re-testing entirely and trusts CI.

**Fix:** Remove the build/test/lint/format/audit steps from the release job in `.github/workflows/release.yml`. Keep only: checkout, Node setup, pnpm install, and the semantic-release step.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Release job no longer runs build, type-check, lint, format check, or audit steps
- Release job still runs: checkout → setup Node → pnpm install → semantic-release
- Workflow YAML is valid
- No changes to `ci.yml`
title: chore: remove redundant test re-run from release workflow
